Metadata.title: PixelVault | Personal AI Gallery
Metadata.description: Generate images, videos, and audio with Gemini, FLUX, and other top AI models — then archive every result in one personal gallery.
Metadata.keywords: AI image generator, AI art, Gemini image, FLUX AI, personal AI gallery, AI video generator, text to image

studio.title: Studio — PixelVault
studio.description: Generate images and videos with multiple AI models in one workspace.

image.title: Image Studio — PixelVault
image.description: Generate images with multiple AI models in one workspace.

video.title: Video Studio — PixelVault
video.description: Turn shots, motion, and scene beats into video with AI.

audio.title: Audio Studio — PixelVault
audio.description: Generate audio with text-to-speech and voice cloning.

edit.title: Image Edit — PixelVault
edit.description: Edit generated images with inpaint, outpaint, super resolution, background removal, and layer tools.

node.title: Node Studio — PixelVault
node.description: Build visual AI creation workflows on a node canvas.

gallery.title: Gallery — PixelVault
gallery.description: Browse the public archive of AI-generated images.

prompts.title: Prompt Engineering — PixelVault
prompts.description: Manage callable prompt templates and review every asset each template has produced.

profile.title: Profile — PixelVault
profile.description: Your generation history, credits, and saved API routes.

assets.title: Assets — PixelVault
assets.description: Browse and manage every generation you've made, organised by project and folder.

cards.title: Card Management — PixelVault
cards.description: Manage your character, style, and background cards in one place.

arena.title: Arena — PixelVault
arena.description: Blind-test AI image models and vote for the best result.

arenaLeaderboard.title: Leaderboard — PixelVault
arenaLeaderboard.description: AI model rankings based on community votes.

storyboard.title: Storyboard — PixelVault
storyboard.description: Create visual narratives from your AI-generated images.

signIn.title: Sign In — PixelVault
signIn.description: Sign in to access your personal AI gallery and creative tools.

signUp.title: Create Account — PixelVault
signUp.description: Join PixelVault to generate, archive, and share AI-created images.

hero.eyebrow: 39 models. Bring your own API key. Pay as you go.
hero.title: Turn ideas into images, footage, and voice.
hero.subtitle: PixelVault is your personal AI creative gallery. Generate images, video, and voice in one place — every render, prompt, and seed is saved automatically.

showcaseRail.title: The archive, growing in real time
showcaseRail.description: A live rail of recent keepers — every prompt and model is one click away to remix.

bottomCta.title: Your next image should belong to you.
bottomCta.description: Five minutes to wire your first API key — then generate across 39 models and keep every image, clip, prompt, and seed in your own R2.

footer.tagline: Personal AI gallery · Bring your own keys · Forever archived

imageEditing.title: Edit with references
imageEditing.description: Drop in a reference image and 24 of our 27 models will use it. Up to 14 references on Gemini, 4 on Flux Kontext Max, 1 on most others. Native i2i, img2img, and director modes — we route to the path each model expects.

video.title: Video Generation
video.description: Kling, Vidu Q3, LumaRay, Veo 3.1, Runway Gen-4.5, Seedance — 16 video models in one studio. Most support image-to-video. Chain shots together for native long video up to 120 seconds.

lora.title: LoRA Training
lora.description: Drop a ZIP, kick off training through fal.ai or Replicate, and we track the run until it lands in your library. Then plug it into Flux Pro, Dev, Schnell, or LoRA — your style, your character, your call.

upscale.title: Upscale & Cleanup
upscale.description: Upscale images 4× through fal.ai. Strip backgrounds in one click. Run lightweight transforms — all from the same studio, no separate tool to learn.

tts.title: Text to Speech
tts.description: Fish Audio S2 Pro handles text-to-speech with public or cloned voices. Pick a voice, choose the reading pace, and every audio result is archived with your images.

model3d.title: Image-to-3D Models
model3d.description: Hunyuan3D v3.1 Pro, Hunyuan3D v3, Trellis 2, Hunyuan3D 2.1, and TripoSR — from high-fidelity multi-view PBR to fast geometry previews. Pick an image from your archive, get a rotatable GLB, drag it in the browser, scan a code to drop it into AR. 3D assets archive alongside images, video, and audio.

workflow.title: Build workflows visually, ship them
workflow.description: Chain models together in a no-code node editor. Connect image generation to upscaling, feed outputs into video, or run batch jobs with branching logic. When it works, hit deploy and call it from your code like any other endpoint.

arena.title: Arena
arena.description: Side-by-side blind comparison with K-factor 32 ELO. You see four results, you pick a winner — never knowing which model made what. Rankings actually move.

archive.title: Permanent archive
archive.description: Every generation lands on Cloudflare R2 with prompt, model, provider, and seed. AES-256-GCM encryption, S3 multipart uploads. Nothing expires, nothing rots.

social.title: Follow, like, collect
social.description: Follow other creators, like generations that resonate, build collections of your favorites. The gallery is public — your private archive is yours alone.

modelLineup.title: The best AI models, ready when you are
modelLineup.description: 39 models from OpenAI, Google, fal.ai, NovelAI, Replicate and VolcEngine. We test, wire, and maintain each one — you bring your own key, swap models per request, and keep every result in your archive.

auth.note: Your account keeps saved routes, private prompts, and archived generations together across sessions.

signIn.title: Return to your archive.
signIn.description: Sign in to continue generating, review saved work, and keep your usage history intact.

signUp.title: Begin a calmer image workflow.
signUp.description: Create an account to generate with multiple models, save each keeper, and build a record you can return to later.

StudioPage.audioPlaceholder: Enter the text you want to convert to speech...
StudioPage.voiceLibraryDescription: Search public voices, filter by language, audition samples, save favorites, or pick one of your cloned voices.
StudioPage.voiceMyEmpty: No custom voices yet. Clone one to get started!
StudioPage.voiceFavoritesEmpty: No favorite voices yet. Star voices in the public library to save them here.
StudioPage.voiceClonedEmpty: No cloned voices yet. Upload audio to create one.
StudioPage.voiceLoadFailed: Failed to load the public voice library. Please try again.
StudioPage.voiceFavoritesLoadFailed: Failed to load favorite voices. Please try again.
StudioPage.voiceClonedLoadFailed: Failed to load cloned voices. Please try again.
StudioPage.voiceFavoriteFailed: Could not update favorite voice. Please try again.
StudioPage.voiceDeleteFailed: Could not delete voice. Please try again.
StudioPage.voiceApiKeyRequired: Add your own Fish Audio API key before using cloned voices, transcription, or generation.
StudioPage.voiceTrainDesc: Upload audio to create your own voice (min 15 seconds)
StudioPage.voiceTrainUpload: Click or drag audio files here
StudioPage.voiceTrainUploadHint: Minimum 15 seconds of clear speech. Multiple files supported.
StudioPage.voiceTrainTranscriptPlaceholder: Text spoken in the audio (improves quality)...
StudioPage.voiceTrainTranscriptHint: If empty, automatic speech recognition will be used.

audioParams.styleHint: Uses Fish S2-Pro [bracket] natural-language prompt tags; this is prompt control, not a separate emotion parameter.
audioParams.paceHint: Uses Fish Audio's speed parameter. Slow and fast now use wider steps so the difference is easier to hear.
audioParams.pauseMarkersHint: Adds a short break after the selected sentence in multi-sentence narration.
audioParams.advancedHint: Leave these defaults for normal narration. Tune them for video dubbing, subtitles, or post-production.
audioParams.formatHint: Choose the exported file container. MP3 is best for sharing; WAV/PCM are better for editing.
audioParams.sampleRateHint: Controls audio fidelity and file size. 44.1 kHz is the safe default for narration.
audioParams.mp3BitrateHint: Higher bitrate keeps more detail but creates a larger MP3 file.
audioParams.opusBitrateHint: Opus works well for web playback at smaller file sizes.
audioParams.latencyHint: Fast starts sooner; stable prioritizes fewer artifacts. Balanced is a good default for drafts.
audioParams.normalizeLoudnessHint: Keeps perceived volume consistent across takes and voices.
audioParams.normalizeTextHint: Lets Fish Audio clean punctuation and symbols before synthesis.
audioParams.withTimestampsHint: Requests segment timing for subtitles and later sentence-level editing.
audioParams.volumeHint: Applies a gain offset after synthesis. Keep it near 0 unless the take is too quiet.
audioParams.temperatureHint: Higher values add variation; lower values make repeated takes more consistent.
audioParams.topPHint: Limits the sampling pool. Lower values sound steadier; higher values can feel more expressive.
audioParams.chunkLengthHint: Controls model chunk size for long text. Shorter chunks can react faster; longer chunks are smoother.
audioParams.repetitionPenaltyHint: Raises resistance to repeated words or phrases in longer narration.
audioParams.speakerVoiceIdsHint: Mapped in order to <|speaker:0|>, <|speaker:1|>. Add chips from the voice library or paste IDs here.
audioParams.speakerVoicePickHint: Select a voice from the library list to assign it.
audioParams.referenceAudioHint: Upload a short clip plus its transcript to clone that voice for this generation. Used only when no preset voice or speaker chip is set.
audioParams.referencePick: Click to upload an audio clip (≤ {max})
audioParams.referenceTextPlaceholder: Type exactly what the clip says…
audioParams.referenceTextHint: Match the speech word-for-word. Fish Audio uses this to lock the voice.
audioParams.referenceTextRequired: Transcript is required when a reference clip is attached.
audioParams.referenceErrorTooLarge: Reference audio is too large. Max {max}.
audioParams.referenceErrorNotAudio: That file isn't audio. Try MP3, WAV, M4A, or FLAC.
audioParams.referenceErrorFailed: Failed to upload the reference clip.

audioFeedback.retryPronunciationHint: Mark tricky words with a pronunciation override in the prompt and try again.

VideoGenerate.promptPlaceholder: Describe the video you want to create...
VideoGenerate.submitHint: Video generation may take 1-5 minutes depending on the model.
VideoGenerate.referenceImageHint: PNG, JPG — drag & drop or click
VideoGenerate.negativePromptPlaceholder: Describe what to avoid in the video...
VideoGenerate.errorFallback: Video generation failed. Please try again.
VideoGenerate.errorTimeout: Video generation timed out. Please try again.

Model3DGenerate.title: Image-to-3D
Model3DGenerate.description: Pick a clean source image and generate a high-detail rotatable GLB model.
Model3DGenerate.sourceImagePlaceholder: Pick an image from the archive
Model3DGenerate.prep3DHint: Upscales small images and white-pads to square before 3D. Recommended.
Model3DGenerate.texturedMeshHint: Hunyuan3D 2.1 only — generate mesh with PBR materials
Model3DGenerate.enablePbrHint: Generate metalness, roughness, and normal maps for game and product rendering.
Model3DGenerate.trellisRemeshHint: Clean up triangles for animation, printing, or engine workflows.
Model3DGenerate.removeBackgroundHint: TripoSR only — strip background before reconstruction
Model3DGenerate.meshPreviewHint: Hunyuan3D v3 / v3.1 Pro builds a geometry preview first, then automatically runs the final PBR model.
Model3DGenerate.refineHint: Re-run with the same source on Hunyuan3D v3.1 Pro for higher-fidelity geometry and PBR textures.
Model3DGenerate.errorGifTooLarge: GIF too large to auto-compress. Max {maxMb} MB — please optimise it first.
Model3DGenerate.apiKeyMissingDescription: Hunyuan3D, Trellis 2, and TripoSR run on fal.ai. Add an active fal key before generating.
Model3DGenerate.openExistingModelDescription: Load a previously generated 3D model from your assets.
Model3DGenerate.sourceQualityTooSmall: Current size is {width}×{height}; the short edge must be at least 512px.
Model3DGenerate.sourceQualityExtremeAspect: Current ratio {width}×{height} is too wide or tall; use a centered near-square source.
Model3DGenerate.sourceQualityChecklist: Before continuing, confirm: one isolated subject, clean background, no occlusion, even lighting, full silhouette visible.
Model3DGenerate.multiViewHint: Renders back / left / right as temporary inputs only. They are not saved to the asset library.
Model3DGenerate.multiViewApiKeyMissing: This multi-view model needs a matching API key first. You can also upload back, left, and right views manually.
Model3DGenerate.multiViewUnsupportedHint: Multi-view input is available for Hunyuan3D v3 / v3.1 Pro.
Model3DGenerate.multiViewPickHint: The final run submits the front image and these side views together.
Model3DGenerate.presetFidelityHint: Flux Kontext + PBR + 500k faces. The best starting point for most scenes — 500k stays sharper than 1.5M.
Model3DGenerate.presetDetailHint: Flux Kontext + PBR + 1M faces. Worth it for texture-heavy or industrial subjects.
Model3DGenerate.presetFastHint: Flux Kontext + PBR off + 500k faces. Cheaper and faster — use for iteration only.
Model3DGenerate.retrySeedHint: Reuses the existing multi-view set and only re-runs 3D with a fresh seed (~30s, doesn't regenerate side views).
Model3DGenerate.provisionalSavingLabel: Rendered — saving to your asset library
Model3DGenerate.provisionalSavingHint: The download button activates once saving completes.
Model3DGenerate.stagedModeHint: Pause after geometry so you can confirm before paying for texture. Cheap retries, no surprises.
Model3DGenerate.stageMeshReadyHint: Check proportions, silhouette, and pose. Continuing to texture takes ~90s more.
Model3DGenerate.continueToTextureHint: Submit the full Normal call — texture + PBR. About 90s.
Model3DGenerate.diagnoseSilhouetteSuggestion: Regenerate side views first, then reroll mesh
Model3DGenerate.diagnoseProportionsSuggestion: Mesh can't be saved — try a different source image
Model3DGenerate.diagnoseFacesSuggestion: Bump face count then re-run mesh
Model3DGenerate.diagnoseUnknownSuggestion: Reroll with a fresh random seed
Model3DGenerate.cancel3DConfirm: Abandon this 3D run? The current geometry will be lost.

MultiViewGenerate.partialSuccess: Only {count} side view(s) succeeded — the final 3D run can still use them.

AdvancedSettings.title: Advanced Settings
AdvancedSettings.negativePromptHint: Describe elements you want to exclude from the generated image, such as blur, noise, or unwanted objects.
AdvancedSettings.negativePromptPlaceholder: Elements to avoid in the generated image...
AdvancedSettings.guidanceScaleHint: Controls how closely the image follows the prompt. Higher values produce more accurate but less creative results.
AdvancedSettings.stepsHint: Number of denoising iterations. More steps generally improve quality but increase generation time.
AdvancedSettings.referenceStrengthHint: How much the reference image influences the result. Lower values give AI more creative freedom.
AdvancedSettings.seedHint: Fix the random seed for reproducible results. Leave empty for a random seed each time.
AdvancedSettings.qualityHint: Output quality level. Higher quality produces more detailed images but may take longer.
AdvancedSettings.backgroundHint: Choose whether the generated image has a transparent or opaque background.
AdvancedSettings.styleHint: Vivid produces dramatic, vibrant images. Natural generates more subdued, realistic results.
AdvancedSettings.loraHint: Apply custom LoRA models for style, character, or concept control. Paste a URL from Civitai or HuggingFace.
AdvancedSettings.noConfigurable: This model has no configurable advanced settings

ReverseEngineer.title: Reverse Engineer
ReverseEngineer.sourceDescription: Upload or choose an image to extract its style, character, background, or tags.
ReverseEngineer.uploadTitle: Drop an image or click to upload
ReverseEngineer.selectDimensions: What do you want to extract from this image?

PromptAssistant.title: Prompt Assistant
PromptAssistant.emptyHint: Add an image to extract its style, or type an instruction to improve the prompt.
PromptAssistant.referenceDescription: Use a reference image for style-aware prompt writing.
PromptAssistant.imageError: Could not read this image. Use a JPG, PNG, or WebP under 10MB.

LayerDecompose.title: Layer Decompose

LayerDecompose.uploadPrompt: Drop an image or click to upload
LayerDecompose.uploadHint: JPG, PNG, WebP — anime characters recommended

welcome.title: Welcome to PixelVault
welcome.description: You can start for free — 5 generations/day with no API key. Bind your own keys later to unlock all models and unlimited usage.

model.title: Choose a model
model.description: Models marked "Free" can be used without an API key — up to 5 times per day. Bind your own key to unlock all models.

samplePrompt.title: Sample prompt ready
samplePrompt.description: We've pre-filled a sample prompt for you — hit Generate to try it out!

apiKey.title: Want to use your own API key?
apiKey.description: You can add your own provider keys for unlimited generation. Skip this if you want to use the default workspace keys.

generate.title: Generate!
generate.description: Hit this button when you're ready. Your image will be auto-archived with its prompt and model info.

sdxl.label: Stable Diffusion XL
sdxl.description: High-resolution image generation with excellent detail.

geminiFlashImage.label: Gemini 3.1 Flash Image
geminiFlashImage.description: Fast image exploration powered by Google's latest generation model.

openaiGptImage2.label: OpenAI GPT Image 2
openaiGptImage2.description: Fast, high-quality image generation and editing with OpenAI's current flagship image model.

flux2Pro.label: Flux 2 Pro
flux2Pro.description: Top-ranked image model by Black Forest Labs with exceptional quality.

flux2Dev.label: Flux 2 Dev
flux2Dev.description: Cost-effective variant of Flux 2 for development and iteration.

flux2Schnell.label: Flux 2 Schnell
flux2Schnell.description: Fastest Flux 2 variant for rapid prototyping and quick generation.

fluxLora.label: FLUX LoRA
fluxLora.description: FLUX with LoRA support. Apply custom LoRA models for anime, 3D, character consistency, and more.

geminiProImage.label: Gemini 3.1 Pro Image
geminiProImage.description: Google's premium image model with studio-quality 4K visuals.

ideogram3.label: Ideogram V3
ideogram3.description: Best-in-class text rendering in images with fast 4-second generation.

recraftV3.label: Recraft V3
recraftV3.description: Design-focused image model with strong brand and style system support.

seedream45.label: Seedream 4.5
seedream45.description: ByteDance's unified generation and editing model with up to 4MP output.

seedream50Lite.label: Seedream 5.0 Lite
seedream50Lite.description: ByteDance's latest lightweight model via VolcEngine. Best quality-to-speed ratio.

seedream40.label: Seedream 4.0
seedream40.description: ByteDance's mid-tier model via VolcEngine with improved quality and 4K support.

seedream30.label: Seedream 3.0
seedream30.description: ByteDance's entry-level model via VolcEngine. Fast and cost-effective.

sd35Large.label: Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large
sd35Large.description: Open-source flagship with 8B MMDiT architecture, strong composition and detail.

novelaiV45Full.label: NovelAI Diffusion V4.5 Full
novelaiV45Full.description: Latest NovelAI model with improved fidelity, multi-character support, and text rendering.

novelaiV45Curated.label: NovelAI Diffusion V4.5 Curated
novelaiV45Curated.description: Curated variant trained on cleaner data — easier to steer, ideal for consistent quality.

novelaiV4Full.label: NovelAI Diffusion V4 Full
novelaiV4Full.description: Previous-gen NovelAI original model with broad dataset coverage.

novelaiV3.label: NovelAI Diffusion Anime V3
novelaiV3.description: SDXL-based anime specialist with tag-priority prompting system.

illustriousXl.label: Illustrious XL
illustriousXl.description: Anime/illustration-specialized model with the largest LoRA ecosystem on Civitai. Supports dual LoRA.

animaPencilXl.label: Anima Base LoRA
animaPencilXl.description: Anima/Qwen LoRA route via fal.ai Qwen Image. Supports Civitai Anima LoRA weights that use Qwen-Image modules.

gemini25FlashImage.label: Gemini 2.5 Flash
gemini25FlashImage.description: Fast and cost-effective by Google. Good text rendering and prompt understanding.

flux2Max.label: FLUX 2 Max
flux2Max.description: Highest quality FLUX model by Black Forest Labs. Exceptional detail and coherence.

recraftV4Pro.label: Recraft V4 Pro
recraftV4Pro.description: Design-focused model for logos, icons, and brand-quality imagery.

fluxKontextPro.label: FLUX Kontext Pro
fluxKontextPro.description: Reference-based editing. Upload an image and describe changes with a prompt.

fluxKontextMax.label: FLUX Kontext Max
fluxKontextMax.description: Multi-reference editing. Combine up to 4 reference images for consistent generation.

playgroundV25.label: Playground v2.5
playgroundV25.description: Aesthetic-focused generation, excels at portraits and artistic compositions.

veo31.label: Veo 3.1
veo31.description: Google's latest — 4K, native audio, dialogue sync

viduQ3Pro.label: Vidu Q3 Pro
viduQ3Pro.description: Latest API-accessible Vidu Q3 model with native audio-video output, text-to-video, and image-to-video.

klingV3Pro.label: Kling 3.0 Pro
klingV3Pro.description: Multi-shot storyboarding, native audio, character consistency

seedance20.label: Seedance 2.0
seedance20.description: ByteDance — native audio + lipsync, director-level camera, 4-15s

seedance20Volc.label: Seedance 2.0 (VolcEngine)
seedance20Volc.description: VolcEngine — native audio + lipsync, director-level camera

seedancePro.label: Seedance Pro
seedancePro.description: ByteDance — native audio, cinematic camera controls

seedance15Pro.label: Seedance 1.5 Pro
seedance15Pro.description: VolcEngine — native audio, first/last frame, draft mode

seedance10Pro.label: Seedance 1.0 Pro
seedance10Pro.description: VolcEngine — first/last frame control, reliable quality

klingVideo.label: Kling V2.1
klingVideo.description: Reliable cinematic video, motion-aware, I2V support

lumaRay2.label: Luma Ray 2
lumaRay2.description: Up to 1080p, loop support, dual-image interpolation

wanVideo.label: Wan 2.6
wanVideo.description: Multi-modal with native audio, up to 1080p, great value

runwayGen45.label: Runway Gen-4.5
runwayGen45.description: Current flagship Runway video model with text-to-video and image-to-video

runwayGen3.label: Runway Gen-3 Turbo
runwayGen3.description: Industry-standard cinematic video, image-to-video on fal.ai

fishAudioS2Pro.label: Fish Audio S2 Pro
fishAudioS2Pro.description: Top-ranked TTS, 30+ languages, natural voice cloning

falF5Tts.label: F5-TTS
falF5Tts.description: Open-source zero-shot voice cloning on fal.ai

hunyuan3d21.label: Hunyuan3D 2.1
hunyuan3d21.description: Tencent image-to-3D, high-fidelity geometry + PBR textures

hunyuan3dV3.label: Hunyuan3D v3
hunyuan3dV3.description: Multi-view image-to-3D with PBR materials and high face counts

hunyuan3dV31Pro.label: Hunyuan3D v3.1 Pro
hunyuan3dV31Pro.description: High-quality multi-view reconstruction for detailed PBR assets

trellis2.label: Trellis 2
trellis2.description: High-detail 3D with adjustable structure, texture, and remesh controls

common.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
common.databaseUnavailable: Database service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

provider.failed: AI provider error. Please try again.
provider.insufficientBalance: The selected Agent Key has insufficient provider balance. Recharge it or choose another Agent Key.
provider.invalidStructuredOutput: The selected planner model returned an incomplete response. Retry or choose another Agent Key.
provider.invalidApiKey: The selected Agent Key is invalid or no longer authorized. Reconfigure it or choose another Agent Key.
provider.rateLimited: The selected planner route is rate limited. Wait a moment or choose another Agent Key.
provider.safetyBlocked: The provider refused this content due to its safety policy. Try switching to another model (e.g. Gemini if you were on GPT, or vice versa).
provider.temporarilyUnavailable: The selected planner model is temporarily unavailable. Try again in a moment or choose another Agent Key.
provider.timeout: AI provider timed out. Please try again.
provider.unsupportedOpenAiReferenceImage: OpenAI accepts JPEG, PNG, or WebP reference images. Convert the image and try again.
provider.unsupportedGeminiReferenceImage: Gemini accepts PNG, JPEG, WebP, HEIC, or HEIF reference images. Convert the image and try again.
provider.unsupportedFalReferenceImage: fal.ai could not read this reference image. Use PNG, JPEG, WebP, or GIF, and make sure the image URL is directly accessible.
provider.unsupportedVolcengineReferenceImage: Seedream could not read this reference image. Use a common format such as JPEG, PNG, or WebP, and make sure the URL is directly accessible.
provider.unsupportedReferenceImage: This model could not read the reference image format. Use JPEG, PNG, or WebP, then try again.
provider.referenceImageTooLarge: The reference image is too large for this model. Compress it or use a smaller image, then try again.
provider.referenceImageUnreachable: The provider could not download the reference image. Use a direct public image URL or upload the image again.
provider.referenceImageLimitExceeded: This model received too many reference images. Remove some reference images and try again.
provider.invalidReferenceImageDimensions: The reference image size or aspect ratio is not supported. Use a different image size and try again.

validation.invalidInput: Invalid input. Please check your parameters.
validation.invalidJson: The request body could not be read.

Errors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.

credits.exceeded: Free generation limit reached for today.

apiKey.missing: API key is required for this model.
apiKey.invalid: Invalid API key. Please check and try again.

profile.usernameInvalid: Username must be 3-30 characters, start with a letter, and use only letters, numbers, or hyphens.
profile.bannerUploadFailed: Failed to upload the cover image.
profile.unsupportedImageType: Please use JPEG, PNG, or WebP.
profile.bannerTooLarge: Cover image must be under 10 MB.

errors.styleRequired: Please select a style or preset.
errors.allFailed: All variants failed to generate. Please try again.
errors.inputTooLarge: Image must be under 10 MB and 2048×2048 pixels.

faceConsent.title: Face Detected
faceConsent.description: This image appears to contain faces. Please confirm you have the right to transform this image.

LoraTraining.title: Train LoRA
LoraTraining.description: Train a custom LoRA model from your images. Uses your Replicate API key.
LoraTraining.name: Model name
LoraTraining.triggerWordHint: A unique word to activate your LoRA in prompts
LoraTraining.subject: Subject (character/object)
LoraTraining.baseModelHint: Pick the architecture to train against. Different bases suit different styles.
LoraTraining.baseModelComingSoon: No API trainer wired up yet — coming soon
LoraTraining.dragToReorderHint: Drag to reorder. The first image becomes the LoRA card cover.
LoraTraining.historyHint: Your training jobs and finished LoRAs
LoraTraining.historyEmpty: No training jobs yet. Start your first one on the right.
LoraTraining.datasetReuseHint: Coming soon — reuse a previous dataset to skip re-uploading
LoraTraining.assetSelectorDescription: Select the images to add to your training set, then click Add
LoraTraining.addApiKeyHint: Add a Replicate API key in the sidebar to use this feature
LoraTraining.trainedLoraReady: LoRA ready — select this character to use it
LoraTraining.usageHint: Add "{triggerWord}" to your prompt when generating. The LoRA will automatically apply the trained style/character.
LoraTraining.emptyDescription: Pick a preset or upload images — your LoRA will learn the character, style, or subject you teach it.
LoraTraining.presetAnimeCharacterDescription: Train a recurring anime character with consistent face and outfit.
LoraTraining.presetAnimeCharacterExplanation: Best for waifu / OC / fanart. Pre-fills FLUX-D + subject mode + a sks_character trigger you can rename.
LoraTraining.presetRealisticPortraitDescription: Capture a real person's likeness for portrait-quality generations.
LoraTraining.presetRealisticPortraitExplanation: Best for photoreal headshots. FLUX-D + subject mode + sks_person trigger.
LoraTraining.presetArtStyleDescription: Teach your LoRA a brushwork, palette, or rendering style instead of a subject.
LoraTraining.presetArtStyleExplanation: Best for unique illustration looks. Switches to style mode so the LoRA generalizes across subjects.
LoraTraining.presetObjectDescription: Train a specific item, vehicle, or environmental prop.
LoraTraining.presetObjectExplanation: Best for product shots, gear, mascots. Keep angles varied and backgrounds clean.
LoraTraining.presetSdxlDescription: Train on SDXL 1.0 base. Backend not wired up yet.
LoraTraining.presetSdxlExplanation: Coming soon — the SDXL trainer endpoint is on the roadmap behind the FLUX redesign.
LoraTraining.presetIllustriousDescription: Train on Illustrious for anime-tuned outputs. Backend not wired up yet.
LoraTraining.presetIllustriousExplanation: Coming soon — Illustrious trainer endpoint lands after SDXL.
LoraTraining.presetComingSoonTooltip: This trainer endpoint isn't wired up yet. Stay on FLUX-D for now.
LoraTraining.presetFooterIdle: Pick a preset above to pre-fill the form — you can always override.
LoraTraining.presetRailSubtitle: Click a card to pre-fill the form
LoraTraining.completionBody: "{name}" finished training. Activate it in the image tool to start generating.

submitGate.invalidTrigger: Trigger word should be letters, numbers, or underscores only.
submitGate.unsupportedBaseModel: Only FLUX-D training is available today.
submitGate.noApiKey: Add a Replicate or fal.ai API key.

LoraTraining.errorInsufficientCredits: Not enough credits to start this training. Top up and try again.
LoraTraining.errorImageTooLarge: One of the images is too large. Keep individual files under 8 MB.
LoraTraining.errorBaseModelUnsupported: That base model isn't wired up yet. Switch to FLUX-D for now.
LoraTraining.errorNamingConflict: A LoRA with this name already exists. Pick a different name.
LoraTraining.errorUpstreamTimeout: The training provider timed out. Wait a moment and retry.
LoraTraining.errorRateLimit: Training provider rate limit hit. Wait a minute, then retry.
LoraTraining.errorQuotaExceeded: You've hit the training quota. Delete an old job or upgrade.
LoraTraining.errorApiKeyInvalid: Your API key was rejected. Check it in settings and try again.
LoraTraining.errorGeneric: Couldn't start training. Try again or check the console for details.

VideoScript.emptyStateHint: Describe a topic, pick a duration, and let AI draft a shot list.
VideoScript.topicPlaceholder: A cat learns to fly over the valley at sunrise
VideoScript.characterCardMissing: Pick a character card to continue
VideoScript.deleteConfirmBody: Generated images and clips in Gallery will be kept.
VideoScript.generateFailedRetry: The AI providers didn't respond. Try again in a moment.

StudioKeepChangePanel.title: Refine Generation
StudioKeepChangePanel.subject: Subject
StudioKeepChangePanel.freeTextPlaceholder: Describe what you want to change...
